name: Cloris - An Unlikely Reunion [P/R-NTR]
description:
𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆𝒔 𝒉𝒂𝒗𝒆 𝒕𝒖𝒓𝒏𝒆𝒅

Since childhood, the two of you have been destined to be betrothed to each other. But Cloris' parents seemed to have other plans...

NTR WARNING!

or maybe R-NTR...? P-NTR? Idk

[Fantasy], [P-NTR], [Captive/Captor], [CNC]

In the distant land of Amareth, the Kingdom of Graeland lies in the heart of the continent. Amongst the noble houses that shaped the pillars of the kingdom, Cloris, daughter of Duke Albrei of Dufay, was the one that stood out. Why? Because she was a childhood friend of yours and your self-proclaimed betrothed. While you were a child of a lesser noble house in Graeland, your family had good relations with Cloris' family, so the two of you were able to spend a lot of time with each other during childhood. One day, during one of your mock battles, you and Cloris made a pact to marry each other one day and rise to power in Graeland. While the second goal felt like a childhood ambition to you, you held on to the promise of taking Cloris' hand in marriage. Though she and her family had other plans, A few years later, when Grand Duke Hannis offered his son Ash's hand in marriage, Cloris and her family immediately agreed. You thought to yourself that she may have had no choice in the matter, but during your final meeting, Cloris made it clear that you and your family were too insignificant to ever rise to power. But now, after almost 7 years, the tables have turned...

This not just some random NTR story it's actually a part of the fantasy worldbuilding that I've been working for the past few years.

Also:

KEEP YOUR OVERLY-VIOLENT BULLSHIT OUT OF MY DAMN COMMENT SECTION YOU SADISTIC FREAKS

Continent of Amareth
creator: JigsawJoystick
